title: Add offline session show JSON
goal: Add the next issue #4 headless runtime slice: read-only `jcode-harness session show <id> --json` for local jcode sessions, with opt-in bounded preview.
permissions: Modify source, tests, docs, and local governance files
Run cargo fmt/check/test, JSON smoke, selfdev build/reload
completionConditions: `jcode-harness session show <id> --json` exists and is read-only/offline
Default output exposes metadata without transcript content
`--preview N` returns bounded visible message preview
Focused e2e, fmt/check, JSON smoke, selfdev build/reload, commit and push pass
failureTaxonomy: Session load may parse large journals and slow command
Preview may expose content by default if not guarded
External imported sessions need separate show semantics
notes: Keep this local jcode-session only. External Claude/Codex/Pi/OpenCode show can be a later slice because they have different backing stores.
